name: git-guard
description: PreToolUse(Bash) + SessionStart git-staleness safety guard, implemented in hexa-lang (`_git_guard.hexa` + `_git_guard_session.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run` — no Python, no shell shim). Five layers, all no-network (FETCH_HEAD mtime is the freshness proxy; the hook NEVER runs `git fetch`). DOWNSTREAM: (1) DENIES force-type push — `git push --force` / `-f` · `--force-with-lease` · `git push <remote> +<ref>` (refspec-level force); quotes stripped before tokenizing (0.4.2). (2) Non-blocking STALE-BASE PUSH advisory (0.5.0): for a non-force push, emits additionalContext when the current branch trails the remote default base (origin/HEAD, else origin/main) by >= 20 commits — the shared-workdir branch-swap / silent-revert fingerprint; push still proceeds. (3) Non-blocking STALE-BASE MERGE advisory (0.6.0, anima #1105): a `gh pr merge` (squash) reaches main via a path the push-time check never saw — it revert-deleted 35190 files in #1105 — so when the command contains `gh pr merge` (no `git push`, not cross-repo `--repo X`), runs the same divergence probe and warns before the merge lands (real deny on mass deletion lives in pr-cycle-hook's deletion-sanity gate). UPSTREAM (0.7.0): (4) Non-blocking CREATION advisory — on `git worktree add` / `git checkout -b` / `git switch -c`, warns when the base does not resolve to `origin/<default>` (local main/HEAD/omitted) OR `.git/FETCH_HEAD` is older than 30 min; steers to `git fetch origin` then base off `origin/<default>`. (5) SessionStart PROACTIVE ff-only auto-sync (0.8.0, was advisory) — `safe_ff_sync()` SILENTLY fast-forwards a clean tree strictly behind origin/<default> via `git fetch && git merge --ff-only` (motivation 2026-05-30: a 28-commit-behind local repo nearly landed a STALE project.tape that would have REVERTED origin governance — the old warn-only layer was exactly what got ignored). Happy path emits NOTHING; the old behind-notice is dropped. SAFETY RAILS: ff-only (NEVER merge-commit/rebase/force) · clean-tree-only · skip-on-doubt (no origin · detached · mid-rebase/merge · diverged) · FETCH_HEAD-gated fetch (>5min, no fetch-storm). Surfaces EXACTLY ONE line only on a true non-ff divergence (local commits ahead AND behind) so the agent realigns by hand; NEVER denies. Hook-bypass (--no-verify) NOT blocked — left to user discipline. NO opt-out by design — no env var, no config file, no exception list.
